body:
ClimaCore provides a native way to create spaces now, so TestHelper is no longer needed.

- **Refactor**

- **Chores**
  - Streamlined test setups across numerous scenarios by standardizing explicit spatial parameters, thereby reducing external dependencies.

title: Remove TestHelper

body:
This fixed the bug that resulted in `NaN`s in the first time slice of any radiation-related diagnostics.

Related PR: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/3769


<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **Bug Fixes**
  - Enhanced simulation consistency by refining the comparison used to set initial conditions, ensuring more reliable and precise behavior during early-stage computations.

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
title: Check for equality with float(t) instead of t
